pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Domain Data Product Owner job postings does not surface this Core Abilities competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
